subject: Trump
body:
I am kind of shocked that our reporters did not contact you re the Trump/women story. Seems to me he got off rather lightly.

How are you doing?

--
Landon Thomas, Jr.  
Financial Reporter  
New York Times  
█████████████
[http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html](http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html)
